scripts.dev: PORT=3001 concurrently -n auth -c green "npm run dev -w services/auth-service"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n auth,problems,submission,analysis -c green,yellow,red,magenta "PORT=3001 npm run dev -w services/auth-service" "PORT=3002 npm run dev -w services/problems-service" "PORT=3003 npm run dev -w services/submission-service" "PORT=3004 npm run dev -w services/analysis-service"
